questions.question: What are the main differences between Authentication Header (AH) and Encapsulating Security Payload (ESP)?
expectedPoints: AH provides authentication and integrity but no encryption
ESP provides encryption, authentication, and integrity
AH protects the IP header (except mutable fields)
ESP does not protect the IP header
AH uses protocol 51, ESP uses protocol 50

questions.question: Explain the two modes of operation in IPsec with appropriate diagrams and use cases.
expectedPoints: Transport mode: protects only payload, original IP header remains
Tunnel mode: protects entire original packet, adds new IP header
Transport mode used for host-to-host communications
Tunnel mode used for network-to-network VPNs
Include packet structure diagrams for both modes
Discuss performance and security implications of each mode
